channel.title: MarketWatch.com - Top Stories
channel.description: MarketWatch, a leading publisher of business and financial news, offers users up-to-the minute news, investment tools, and subscription products.
channel.copyright: Copyright © Dow Jones & Company, Inc. All rights reserved.

item.title: Here are some bargain bank stocks heading into earnings season
item.description: A close look at valuations for the largest U.S. banks highlights opportunities for long-term investors.
item.dc:creator: Philip van Doorn

item.title: There are years-long waiting lists to retire on college campuses. 6 steps to take before enrolling.
item.description: Retiring to a college community can be great — if you can afford it.
item.dc:creator: Richard Eisenberg

item.title: United Airlines wants even higher ticket prices. It’ll get them — with or without the Iran war.
item.description: United’s new ‘luxury’ strategy is a risky bet for investors when fares and complaints are sky-high.
item.dc:creator: Kenneth Rapoza

item.title: Mortgage rates dip following Iran cease-fire. Why that’s great timing for people selling a home.
item.description: The spring home-buying season may have just gotten a boost of confidence.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Keshner

item.title: My wife and I want to move to Malaysia. Will we receive Social Security benefits there?
item.description: ‘Would we have to forget about those benefits and live off of other income?’
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Malito

item.title: Corporate tax cuts from the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ aren’t giveaways — the new law actually fuels investment
item.description: By restoring 100% bonus depreciation, the OBBBA is providing liquidity needed for economic growth.
item.dc:creator: Erica York

item.title: Here’s when gas prices and airfares could go down if the Iran cease-fire holds
item.description: Stock markets were rallying on Wednesday, but drivers shouldn’t hold their breath waiting for a return to prewar gas prices.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Keshner
Myra P. Saefong

item.title: We asked our wedding guests to give money to St. Jude’s Children’s Hospital. Can we write off their donations?
item.dc:creator: Quentin Fottrell

item.title: Interest rates are headed lower — real yields suggest a half-point Fed cut is coming
item.description: The Iran cease-fire may be the ‘green light’ the Fed needs.
item.dc:creator: Mark Hulbert

item.title: Here’s how much weight-loss drugs Wegovy, Zepbound and Foundayo cost — and how to pick the best GLP-1 for you
item.description: The GLP-1 market is growing fast. Here’s how much the most popular medications will cost you.
item.dc:creator: Genna Contino
